title: graphorkis dregeana
intro: Graphorkis dregeana is a species of orchid native to the eastern regions of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Graphorkis dregeana is often used as a decoction or infusion, with some traditional healers combining it with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
